scripts.api:dev: bun run infra:up && bun run --cwd apps/api start:dev
scripts.verify: bun run check:boundaries && bun run types:typecheck && bun run email:typecheck && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run email:test && bun run --cwd apps/api verify
scripts.check: biome check --write package.json biome.json apps packages tooling
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json biome.json apps packages tooling
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json biome.json apps packages tooling
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json biome.json apps packages tooling
